title: Promotional materials - Canada.ca
content:
## Food guide friendly: Promotional materials
- Create a healthier food environment
- Healthy food environments
- Principles to improve food environments
- Promotional materials
You can promote healthy eating decisions in a variety of ways. One way is to provide visual cues, such as on posters or monitors, to support healthy eating behaviours. Encourage patrons to enjoy a variety of healthy foods each day, including the options you offer. Promotional materials are available in a variety of formats and dimensions to suit different settings.
Vegetables and fruits
Protein foods, including plant-based
Water as a drink of choice
Eat a variety of healthy foods
For recipes and more food guide resources visit: Canada.ca/FoodGuide
